project_type: Next.js 16 Task Manager with Supabase backend
build_system: npm with Next.js build system. Node v22.22.3 available via nvm (source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh before running any node/npm commands)
test_framework: NONE currently - will install Vitest + React Testing Library + jsdom
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && npm install' to install deps. 2. Run 'source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && npx vitest run' to run all tests. 3. Confirm all tests pass with zero failures.
environment_constraints: Node.js requires 'source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh' before use. OPEN_INTERNET network mode - full npm registry access available.
contribution_requirements: AGENTS.md warns about Next.js 16 breaking changes - use docs in node_modules/next/dist/docs/ if modifying Next.js-specific code. For testing, this is less relevant since we mock Next.js modules.
key_patterns: Server Actions in app/actions.ts use 'use server' directive. All DB access via createClient() from @/lib/supabase/server. Components use React 19 useTransition for async operations. Path alias @/* maps to project root. Client components use 'use client' directive.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js app router (page.tsx, actions.ts, layout.tsx, components/, login/, signup/). lib/supabase/ - Supabase client factories (server.ts, client.ts). public/ - static assets. supabase/ - Supabase config.
